skills.title: A1_multi_worktree_plan_agent
skills.description: Split one feature/analysis task into parallel worktrees or agent sessions without merge chaos.

skills.title: A2_parallel_worktrees_execute_agent
skills.description: Create two parallel worktrees, make independent changes, reconcile cleanly with test proof.

skills.title: A3_polyglot_fraud_system_agent
skills.description: Build mini fraud-score system: FastAPI ingestion, Node.js worker, Rust scoring engine with tests and README.

skills.title: A4_modernization_executable_agent
skills.description: Analyze repo for modernization opportunities, prioritize, implement highest-value lowest-risk first step.

skills.title: A5_adversarial_code_review_agent
skills.description: Review agent-generated PR for correctness, security, test, performance, maintainability issues; propose fixes.

skills.title: A6_performance_improvement_agent
skills.description: Find real performance bottleneck, make measurable minimal improvement, prove behavior unchanged.

skills.title: B1_repo_artifact_inventory_agent
skills.description: Inspect an unfamiliar repository and produce a deterministic inventory of classes, interfaces, services, controllers, models, repositories, jobs, consumers, configs, and utilities.

skills.title: B2_api_endpoint_map_agent
skills.description: Identify every externally exposed API route and frontend route; map each to handler and controller via static inspection.

skills.title: B3_test_discovery_agent
skills.description: Find test framework, config file, relevant test files, and exact commands to run tests for a module.

skills.title: B4_fastapi_greenfield_agent
skills.description: Build a small Python FastAPI service from scratch with POST/GET endpoints, input validation, tests, and README.

skills.title: B5_nodejs_greenfield_agent
skills.description: Build equivalent transaction/balance service as Node.js API or CLI with tests and README.

skills.title: B6_rust_greenfield_agent
skills.description: Build Rust CLI that accepts file path, counts INFO/WARN/ERROR lines, handles missing file gracefully, with tests and README.

skills.title: D1_terraform_plan_agent
skills.description: Write Terraform for small service that passes validate and produces clean plan against test backend.

skills.title: D2_docker_compose_stack_agent
skills.description: Stand up multi-service stack (API + DB + worker) with docker-compose, seed data, and E2E test script.

skills.title: D3_ci_pipeline_agent
skills.description: Write CI workflow that lints, tests, builds and tags container image with green run proof.

skills.title: D4_kubernetes_manifests_agent
skills.description: Write K8s manifests, validate with dry-run/kubeval, deploy on kind/minikube with curl proof.

skills.title: D5_reproducible_dev_env_agent
skills.description: Bootstrap repo from fresh clone with single command; tests pass on clean machine.

skills.title: D6_observability_bolt_on_agent
skills.description: Add structured logging and /metrics endpoint; stand up Prometheus + Grafana with working dashboard panel.

skills.title: I1_er_diagram_agent
skills.description: Build ER diagram for all tables and entities from repo source only; cite source file for every claim.

skills.title: I2_flow_trace_agent
skills.description: Trace one endpoint, event, or cron job end-to-end from entry point to final DB/API/queue side effect.

skills.title: I3_safe_change_agent
skills.description: Make a small focused change in an unfamiliar module with minimal diff, test update, and verification log.

skills.title: I4_polyglot_fastapi_node_agent
skills.description: Build FastAPI /convert service and Node.js CLI client with hardcoded rates, tests, and two-terminal README.

skills.title: I5_dockerize_agent
skills.description: Containerize a service so it builds and runs cleanly in Docker with health check proof.

skills.title: I6_bug_diagnosis_agent
skills.description: Reproduce seeded bug, identify root cause with file paths, apply minimal fix, verify with command proof.
